quality.rationale: 需从基灵方程出发进行多步代数分类推导，逻辑链条完整；结构可直接迁移至其他最大对称时空；解答详尽清晰但偏理论形式化

origin.question: 10.9. In flat Minkowski spacetime find ten Killing vectors that are linearly independent.
origin.answer: 十组线性独立的基灵矢量分量：平移 $\xi_i^\\mu = a_i^\\mu$ (i=1-4)，旋转 $\xi_k^0=0, \\xi_k^i=\\varepsilon^{ikm}x_m$ (k=1-3)，Boost $\xi_\\mu^k = \\delta_\\mu^0 x^k - \\delta_\\mu^k x^0$ (k=1-3)。
origin.solution:
Choose a coordinate system in which the metric is $\eta_{\mu 
u}$ (all of the Christoffoff symbols vanish). Then Killing's equation for a Killing vector $\pmb{\xi}$ becomes
$$
2 \xi_{(\mu ; 
u)} = \xi_{\mu , 
u} + \xi_{
u , \mu} = 0. 	ag {1}
$$
We now enumerate and classify linearly independent solutions of Equation (1):
(i) Translation Killing vectors:
$$
\xi_{i}^{\mu} = a_{i}^{\mu} \quad i = 1 - 4 	ag {2}
$$
where $\mathbf{a}_{\mathrm{i}}$ are constant vectors.
(ii) Rotational Killing vectors:
$$
\xi_{\mathrm {k}}^{0} = 0, \quad \xi_{\mathrm {k}}^{1} = \varepsilon^{1 \mathrm {k m}} \mathrm {x}_{\mathrm {m}} \quad \mathrm {k} = 1 - 3. 	ag {3}
$$
Check:
$$
 egin{array}{l} \xi_{\mathbf {k} (\mu , 
u)} = \xi_{\mathbf {k} (\mathrm {i}, \mathrm {j})} = \mathrm {x}_{\mathrm {m}, (\mathrm {j}} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {i}) \mathrm {k m}} \ = \delta_{\mathrm {m} (\mathrm {j})} \varepsilon_{\mathrm {i}) \mathrm {k m}} = - \varepsilon_{\mathrm {k} (\mathrm {i j})} = 0. \ \end{array}
$$
(iii) Boost Killing vectors:
$$
\xi_{\mu}^{k} = \delta_{\mu}^{[ 0} x^{k ]} k = 1, 3. 	ag {4}
$$
Check:
$$
\xi_{(\mu , 
u)}^{\mathrm {k}} =  rac {1}{2} \left[ \delta_{\mu}^{[ 0} \delta_{
u}^{\mathrm {k} ]} + \delta_{
u}^{[ 0} \delta_{\mu}^{\mathrm {k} ]}ight] = 0.
$$
There are ten Killing vectors in Equations (2)-(4), given in the coordinate system in which $\mathbf{g}_{\mu 
u} = (-1, 1, 1, 1)$ . In any other coordinate system one can find the components of the $\xi_{i}^{\mu}$ , for $i = 1 - 10$ , by transforming them as vectors.
